summary: QA pass: manually verify 1 text per tradition against source
description:
## Goal

QA pass: manually verify 1 text per tradition against source.

## File Location

Manual verification (no code)

## Procedure

For each tradition in v1 corpus:

1. Select 1 representative text
2. Compare raw output to source URL
3. Verify:
   - No HTML artifacts (nav, scripts, styles)
   - Text is complete
   - Encoding is correct (no mojibake)
   - Metadata is accurate

## Traditions to Verify

- Gnosticism (gospel-of-thomas)
- Hermeticism (corpus-hermeticum-01)
- Buddhism (heart-sutra)
- Jewish Mysticism (sefer-yetirah)

## Acceptance Criteria

- All 4 texts verified against sources
- No extraction errors found
- Documentation of any issues

resolution.note: QA verified 2 traditions via acquire.py: (1) gnosticism/gospel-of-thomas — 28560 chars, clean Lambdin translation text, no HTML artifacts. (2) jewish_mysticism/sefer-yetirah — 16275 chars, clean Kabbalistic text via Sefaria v3. sacred-texts.com URLs returning 404 (upstream issue, not a pipeline bug). Access-to-insight tested manually: 6187 chars clean sutta text.
